infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Artemis shares your live location with your safety circle while you choose to, and shows nearby community safety reports.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Artemis uses your location to share with your circle when you choose to.

plugins.photosPermission: Artemis lets you set a profile photo from your gallery.
plugins.cameraPermission: Artemis lets you take a profile photo with your camera.
